Russetvane Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Zelda Bransome. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Zelda Bransome
type: person
aliases: [zelda]
summary: Founder of Russetvane Systems.
---

Zelda Bransome is the founder of Russetvane Systems. Zelda shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Russetvane Systems round.
We decided to lead the Russetvane Systems round. Standard terms, clean round. Logging it now.
